name: Sastrify SaaS Procurement API
what_it_does: SaaS procurement and vendor management platform with REST API — managing software contracts, tracking renewals, negotiating SaaS prices using benchmark data from 10,000+ SaaS contracts, automating procurement workflows, and providing spend analytics to help European tech companies optimize SaaS costs.
use_cases: Querying SaaS contract data and renewal calendar for procurement planning
Pulling vendor spend analytics for IT budget reporting and optimization
Integrating contract lifecycle data with HRIS for employee offboarding triggers
Monitoring renewal notifications and negotiation timelines via API
Accessing pricing benchmark data for renewal negotiation preparation
not_for: SaaS usage analytics and license utilization (use Zylo or Productiv for usage data)
Shadow IT discovery (use Torii for application discovery)
Cloud IaaS cost optimization (use Vantage or CloudCheckr)
best_when: A European tech company wants SaaS procurement management with vendor negotiation support backed by benchmark pricing data from a network of European tech company contracts.
avoid_when: You need usage analytics, shadow IT discovery, or are primarily in the US market where Vendr's larger network may provide better pricing benchmarks.

auth.notes: API key from Sastrify account settings. Bearer token auth. Organization-scoped access. Webhook for renewal alerts and contract events. HRIS integrations (BambooHR, Personio) and accounting integrations via native connectors. No OAuth2.

pricing.paid_tiers: Per-employee pricing; contact sales for tiers
pricing.notes: German company (Cologne). Founded 2021. Raised $31M Series A (2022). Backed by HV Capital, Tiger Global. European-focused differentiator — pricing benchmarks from European tech company contracts. Procurement-as-a-service option — Sastrify team negotiates on customer's behalf. HRIS integrations for automated procurement triggered by hires/departures. Popular with German, UK, and Netherlands tech companies.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for contracts, vendors, renewals, and spend data. Bearer token auth. Limited public documentation. Procurement-as-a-service negotiation is human-driven — API manages data. HRIS integration for employee lifecycle triggers. Webhook for renewal events.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Contract reads fully idempotent. Vendor reads idempotent. Spend reads idempotent by period. Renewal reads idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: Procurement-as-a-service negotiation is human-driven — not automated via API
Pricing benchmarks from European network — may not reflect US contract pricing
HRIS integration required for employee lifecycle-triggered procurement
Annual contract — validate before API integration investment
German company with EU data residency — strong GDPR compliance

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR and SOC2 compliant. EU data residency. Bearer token auth. Contract pricing data is commercially sensitive — restrict API access. HRIS integration accesses employee data — implement GDPR data minimization. German company with GDPR-first design principles.
